channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: No tax charges in SPLC probe after IRS deemed informant program legal
item.description: FBI and IRS agents investigated the SPLC's paid informant program starting during Trump's first term.

item.title: Watch: How the wine industry is adapting to climate change with new approaches
item.description: Human-driven climate change is prompting the wine industry to alter its practices.

item.title: Special education funding continues to flow to for-profit residential centers despite scrutiny
Trump says he is currently meeting to decide on Iran deal
item.description: President Trump stated Friday that Iran must agree to never possess nuclear weapons and to reopen the Strait of Hormuz immediately without tolls.
